Name.jp: シャドウビースト・ファイア

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Burned</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>화상</color>을 부여합니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>烧伤</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Burned</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>화상</color>을 부여합니다.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>烧伤</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

name.jp: クリムゾングローリング

description.en: Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Burned</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>화상</color>을 부여합니다.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>烧伤</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nIncreases <color=#28d9ed>Effectiveness</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color> at the start of battle. Greatly increases damage dealt if the target is inflicted with <color=#28d9ed>Poisoned</color> or <color=#28d9ed>Burned</color>.
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n전투 시작 시 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>효과 적중</color>이 증가합니다. 또한 대상이 <color=#28d9ed>중독</color>, <color=#28d9ed>화상</color> 상태라면 피해량이 크게 증가합니다.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n戦闘開始時、<color=#28d9ed>効果命中</color>が<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPする。対象が<color=#28d9ed>中毒</color>、<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>状態の場合ダメージが大幅にUPする。
description.zh: (被动效果)\n战斗开始时,使<color=#28d9ed>效果命中</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。若目标处于<color=#28d9ed>中毒</color>、<color=#28d9ed>烧伤</color>状态,则伤害量大幅提升。
